_source: Anhui Aolo PI GK20260402LJ + GK20260410LJ (data/parsed/quotations via scripts/firestore/upload_aolo_fence.py)

board._per_m_source: Both PI samples consistent: $4.40/2.0m=$2.20/m, $4.455/2.025m=$2.20/m. Used for non-standard widths.

gate._weight_source: estimate: ~2.4 m^2 panel @ 2.2 kg/m board * 2.0m * 6 boards + aluminium frame ~5 kg

weight_cbm_model._status: ESTIMATE — not vendor-confirmed. Boards use published spec; posts are computed from physics; accessories are bundled.

board._kg_source: website/PROMPT.md (Co-Extrusion: ~2.2 kg/m) and website/products.html spec block

post._kg_source: computed: 80mm x 80mm hollow alu, 2mm wall -> X-section 624 mm^2; aluminium density 2700 kg/m^3; 0.000624 * 2700 = 1.685 kg/m. Wall thickness 2mm is the conservative-moderate spec for fencing posts.

weight_cbm_model._buffer_source: clamps + covers + connectors + screws + caps + pedestals + expansion screws collectively contribute <5% of fence kit weight; bundled as a flat buffer rather than fabricating individual densities for every SKU.
